{% set orders = frappe.db.sql("SELECT order_date as dt, invoice as ref, trans_type, total_cost as debit FROM `tabLMT Order` WHERE customer_key=%s AND order_status='Complete' ORDER BY order_date", (doc.lmt_key,), as_dict=True) %} {% set payments = frappe.db.sql("SELECT date as dt, receipt_number as ref, dept as trans_type, received as credit FROM `tabLMT Payment` WHERE customer_key=%s ORDER BY date", (doc.lmt_key,), as_dict=True) %} {% set rows = [] %} {% for r in orders %}{% set _ = rows.append({"dt": r.dt, "ref": r.ref or "", "trans_type": r.trans_type, "debit": r.debit or 0, "credit": 0}) %}{% endfor %} {% for r in payments %}{% set _ = rows.append({"dt": r.dt, "ref": r.ref or "", "trans_type": r.trans_type or "تحصيل", "debit": 0, "credit": r.credit or 0}) %}{% endfor %} {% set rows = rows|sort(attribute="dt") %} {% set ns = namespace(balance=0, total_sales=0, total_paid=0) %} {% if rows %} {% for r in rows %} {% set ns.balance = ns.balance + (r.debit or 0) - (r.credit or 0) %} {% set ns.total_sales = ns.total_sales + (r.debit or 0) %} {% set ns.total_paid = ns.total_paid + (r.credit or 0) %} {% endfor %} {% else %} {% endif %}
التاريخ المرجع النوع البيع التحصيل الرصيد
{{ r.dt.strftime("%d/%m/%Y") if r.dt else "" }} {{ r.ref }} {{ r.trans_type }} {% if r.debit %}{{ "{:,.3f}".format(r.debit) }}{% endif %} {% if r.credit %}{{ "{:,.3f}".format(r.credit) }}{% endif %} {{ "{:,.3f}".format(ns.balance) }}
